caption: The video appears to be a screen recording of a terminal session, likely from a Kubernetes-related presentation or tutorial, as indicated by the directory path "/kubecon_us_2020". Initially, the user runs a command to list all pods across all namespaces using `kubectl get pods --all-namespaces`, which displays various system pods running within the "kube-system" namespace and one pod named "apache-logs-annotated" in the "default" namespace. The user then attempts to view the logs of the "apache-logs-annotated" pod using the command `kubectl logs apache-logs`. However, the subsequent frame shows an empty terminal prompt, suggesting that the command execution may have been interrupted or completed without displaying any output. The timestamp indicates that this activity took place on October 28th at around midnight. The presence of a small video feed in the corner suggests that this is part of a live presentation or webinar.
